target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building facade extensively missing; roof collapsed; debris pile covering ground level; structural framing largely intact but non-load-bearing elements completely destroyed; damage exceeds 75% of visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The right wing of the building shows complete collapse of its upper floors and roof; structural elements are missing; debris pile indicates total loss of structural integrity; damage exceeds 75% of visible target element area.

summary: Two buildings assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence: one central structure with extensive facade loss and collapsed roof, and a right-wing section with complete upper floor and roof collapse. The overall scene depicts a street-level view of severely damaged multi-story buildings with widespread debris and structural collapse, indicating total destruction of habitable space. The functional impact is likely complete loss of building utility, with no viable shelter or operational infrastructure remaining.
